exploration.title: Solo-Firm IP Docketing
openQuestions: Review gate: ratify L2 = narrow US-deterministic handroll first (maintenance fees, §133/§136 response periods, PCT national-phase, TM post-reg), with vendor connectors (CPI/LawToolBox/Alt Legal) as additive redundancy — vs buy-first.
Review gate: ratify jurisdiction scope = US patents first, then TM, then court orders, then foreign.
Review gate: green-light the dead-man's-switch / heartbeat reliability model as a first-class requirement.
Review gate: pursue CPI / LawToolBox partner-API access evaluation now, or defer until after the handroll spine ships?
